title: Huntington Bancshares slid 10% on Friday: how come?
text: Huntington Bancshares Inc (NASDAQ: HBAN) slid 10% in the stock market on Friday after the bank holding company said its profit and revenue came in shy of Street estimates in the fiscal fourth quarter. Q4 financial performance Huntington reported $401 million in net income that translates to 26 cents per share.

title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -2.70% and 2.31%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Huntington Bancshares stock down after earnings miss
text: Huntington Bancshares Inc. HBAN, -2.51% shares fell 4.4% in premarket trades on Friday after the bank missed Wall Street's earnings target. The Columbus, Ohio financial company said it earned $401 million, or 26 cents a share in the fourth quarter, up from $316 million, or 27 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED REPORTS FULL YEAR 2021 AND FOURTH-QUARTER EARNINGS
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio, Jan. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- 2021 Fourth-Quarter Highlights: Earnings per common share (EPS) for the quarter were $0.26, a decrease of $0.01 year-over-year. Excluding $0.10 per common share after tax of Notable Items, adjusted earnings per common share were $0.36.

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED TO ANNOUNCE 2021 FOURTH QUARTER EARNINGS AND HOLD EARNINGS CONFERENCE CALL JANUARY 21, 2022
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio, Jan. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) expects to report its 2021 fourth quarter earnings on Friday, January 21, 2022, prior to the market opening.  A news release and supporting financial data will be available at that time on the Investor Relations section of the company's website.
